items.final_wording: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

source.title: Thyroid disease: assessment and management
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with suspected or diagnosed thyroid disease, subject to recommendation-specific age and disease qualifiers.
source.setting: Assessment, investigation, treatment discussion, monitoring, and follow-up of thyroid disease.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected thyroid-testing, thyroid-enlargement warning, hypothyroidism-monitoring, and hyperthyroidism-monitoring documentation. Symptom diagnosis, medicine selection or dose, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.6 — information and thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

items.rationale: Supports rapid growth, hoarse voice, swallowing and breathing warning symptoms for thyroid nodule surgical clinic; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

source.title: Thyroid disease: assessment and management
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with suspected or diagnosed thyroid disease, subject to recommendation-specific age and disease qualifiers.
source.setting: Assessment, investigation, treatment discussion, monitoring, and follow-up of thyroid disease.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected thyroid-testing, thyroid-enlargement warning, hypothyroidism-monitoring, and hyperthyroidism-monitoring documentation. Symptom diagnosis, medicine selection or dose, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.8 — thyroid enlargement with normal thyroid function

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

items.rationale: Supports palpable enlargement or focal nodularity, qualified ultrasound and compression context for thyroid nodule surgical clinic; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician recognition of recommendation-qualified persistent unexplained hoarseness, unexplained or persistent neck lump, oral ulceration lasting more than 3 weeks, lip or oral-cavity lump, red or red-and-white oral patch, and unexplained thyroid lump. It does not assert cancer or generate referral.

source.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with symptoms or signs that may indicate cancer, subject to recommendation-specific age criteria.
source.setting: Primary care recognition, safety netting, investigation, and referral.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected suspicious skin-lesion, safety-netting, and age- or risk-qualified respiratory recommendations; international suspected-cancer pathways require UAE clinician review. It does not assert cancer or generate referral.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.8.1–1.8.5 — laryngeal, oral, and thyroid cancer recognition features

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician recognition of recommendation-qualified persistent unexplained hoarseness, unexplained or persistent neck lump, oral ulceration lasting more than 3 weeks, lip or oral-cavity lump, red or red-and-white oral patch, and unexplained thyroid lump. It does not assert cancer or generate referral.

added_items.rationale: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained thyroid lump without asserting cancer for thyroid nodule surgical clinic; no decision is generated.
